label: Log area readings manually
items: New "Log" button on every area's sensor panel (top of the area-edit modal). Opens a single form covering moisture / temperature / EC — fill in only the metrics you have (USB probe, calibrated meter, eyeballed estimate) and pick when the reading was taken. Empty fields are skipped.

Sensor readings now also fan out to the area's metric history automatically. Every reading from a linked sensor mirrors into the area's moisture / temp / EC timeline, so the same chart shows both sources side-by-side.
